response.overview: Haziqah dreams of a happy life beside Yusri. However, she does not anticipate that when the long-awaited day arrives, a scandal emerges that questions her virtue. Because of this, her wedding pavilion of dreams crumbles, causing her hopes to shatter into pieces as if swept away. However, Haziqah is determined. The ceremony must go on. What matters most is that the scandal can be stopped. Although Fakrul has never been loved by her, she is willing to accept him as a husband as long as her virtue can be proven. Unfortunately, the marriage that is created only adds to the suffering already weighing on her shoulders. She is scorned and left hanging without support! For Fakrul, his heart has been closed to love after Azura, the first girl he cherished, betrayed him. He hates women who are unfaithful. So, when forced to accept Haziqah as his wife, his hatred seems to intensify.
response.title: Sepi Tanpa Cinta
